# rc-mcp-manage-channels

> Minimal MCP server for Rocket.Chat: manage-channels

**Generated by [rc-mcp](https://github.com/your-org/rc-mcp)** — Minimal MCP Server Generator for Rocket.Chat.

## Tools (8)

| Tool | Method | Endpoint | Description |
|------|--------|----------|-------------|
| `login` | POST | `/api/v1/login` | Login with Username and Password |
| `channels_create` | POST | `/api/v1/channels.create` | Create Channel |
| `channels_archive` | POST | `/api/v1/channels.archive` | Archive Channel |
| `channels_unarchive` | POST | `/api/v1/channels.unarchive` | Unarchive a Channel |
| `channels_rename` | POST | `/api/v1/channels.rename` | Rename a Channel |
| `channels_setDescription` | POST | `/api/v1/channels.setDescription` | Set Channel Description |
| `channels_info` | GET | `/api/v1/channels.info` | Get Channel Information |
| `channels_list` | GET | `/api/v1/channels.list` | Get Channel List |

## Quick Start

### 1. Install dependencies

\`\`\`bash
npm install
\`\`\`

### 2. Configure environment

\`\`\`bash
cp .env.example .env
# Edit .env with your Rocket.Chat credentials
\`\`\`

### 3. Build and run

\`\`\`bash
npm run build
npm start
\`\`\`

### 4. Use with gemini-cli

Add to your \`settings.json\`:

\`\`\`json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "rc-mcp-manage-channels": {
      "command": "node",
      "args": ["./dist/server.js"],
      "env": {
        "RC_URL": "http://localhost:3000",
        "RC_USER": "your-user",
        "RC_PASSWORD": "your-password"
      }
    }
  }
}
\`\`\`

## Development

\`\`\`bash
# Run in development mode (no build step)
npm run dev

# Run tests
npm test
\`\`\`
